news.title:
Agrochemical stocks, including NFL, GSFC, GNFC, and Chambal Fertilisers, fell up to 5% due to West Asia tensions.
Supply chain disruptions, high input costs, and weather concerns impacted fertiliser industry outlook.
news.summary:
Agrochemical stocks, including NFL, GSFC, GNFC, and Chambal Fertilisers, fell up to 5% due to West Asia tensions.
Supply chain disruptions, high input costs, and weather concerns impacted fertiliser industry outlook.

news.title: GNFC faces reduced neem urea production due to LNG supply issues linked to West Asia conflict.
news.summary: GNFC faces reduced neem urea production due to LNG supply issues linked to West Asia conflict.

news.title:
Middle East conflict impacts LNG supply; GNFC's RLNG supply cut to 60% from Mar 6, 2026.
Neem Urea production affected, while other GNFC products remain unaffected.
news.summary:
Middle East conflict impacts LNG supply; GNFC's RLNG supply cut to 60% from Mar 6, 2026.
Neem Urea production affected, while other GNFC products remain unaffected.

news.title:
GNFC to receive RLNG supplies at 60% of daily contract quantity.
Reduced RLNG supplies may impact Neem urea production operations.
news.summary:
GNFC to receive RLNG supplies at 60% of daily contract quantity.
Reduced RLNG supplies may impact Neem urea production operations.

news.title:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.
news.summary:
Fertiliser stocks Chambal, RCF, GNFC may dip as LNG supply disruption from Qatar impacts urea production.
India's fertiliser firms cut output; prolonged supply issues could force shutdowns amid spiking global LNG prices.

news.title:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.
news.summary:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.

news.title:
GNFC held an Investor/Analyst Meet on Feb 11, 2026, via conference call.
Audio recording and transcript are available on GNFC's website and shared with stock exchanges.
news.summary:
GNFC held an Investor/Analyst Meet on Feb 11, 2026, via conference call.
Audio recording and transcript are available on GNFC's website and shared with stock exchanges.

news.title:
GNFC reports Q3 FY25 revenue of Rs.2,000 crore and PAT of Rs.150 crore.
Rs.2,800 crore CAPEX project is currently underway for GNFC.
news.summary:
GNFC reports Q3 FY25 revenue of Rs.2,000 crore and PAT of Rs.150 crore.
Rs.2,800 crore CAPEX project is currently underway for GNFC.

news.title:
GNFC's EBITDA rose 29.5% with an 8.6% margin; Chambal Fert's EBITDA grew 5.5% with 20% revenue growth.
TVS Supply Chain's EBITDA increased 36.7% with 7.6% margin; Speciality Rest's EBITDA rose 18% with 21.4% margin YoY.
news.summary:
GNFC's EBITDA rose 29.5% with an 8.6% margin; Chambal Fert's EBITDA grew 5.5% with 20% revenue growth.
TVS Supply Chain's EBITDA increased 36.7% with 7.6% margin; Speciality Rest's EBITDA rose 18% with 21.4% margin YoY.

news.title:
GNFC Q2 FY26 net profit surged 115.7% QoQ to ₹179 crore.
Stock traded at ₹488.9, up 1.65%, amid mixed results and margin concerns.
news.summary:
GNFC Q2 FY26 net profit surged 115.7% QoQ to ₹179 crore.
Stock traded at ₹488.9, up 1.65%, amid mixed results and margin concerns.

news.title:
Gujarat Narmada Valley's revenue rose QoQ due to higher chemical volumes.
Net profit fell slightly on lower other income; maintenance shutdowns hit 9M revenue.
news.summary:
Gujarat Narmada Valley's revenue rose QoQ due to higher chemical volumes.
Net profit fell slightly on lower other income; maintenance shutdowns hit 9M revenue.

news.title:
Shri Ashwini Kumar, IAS, is appointed as Director on the Board of Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd.
His appointment replaces Shri S. J. Haider, IAS, and is subject to statutory procedures and approvals.
news.summary:
Shri Ashwini Kumar, IAS, is appointed as Director on the Board of Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd.
His appointment replaces Shri S. J. Haider, IAS, and is subject to statutory procedures and approvals.

news.title:
GNFC's senior management will meet investors/analysts via conference call on Feb 11, 2026, at 4:00 PM IST.
The meeting will discuss Q3 FY26 financial performance, with details available on GNFC's website.
news.summary:
GNFC's senior management will meet investors/analysts via conference call on Feb 11, 2026, at 4:00 PM IST.
The meeting will discuss Q3 FY26 financial performance, with details available on GNFC's website.

news.title:
Gujarat Govt replaces T. Natarajan with Rajkumar Beniwal as MD of GNFC.
Leadership change marks a significant development for Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers.
news.summary:
Gujarat Govt replaces T. Natarajan with Rajkumar Beniwal as MD of GNFC.
Leadership change marks a significant development for Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers.

news.title: Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers & Chemicals announces withdrawal of T. Natarajan as MD by Gujarat government.
news.summary: Gujarat Narmada Valley Fertilizers & Chemicals announces withdrawal of T. Natarajan as MD by Gujarat government.

news.title:
GNFC awarded Rs. 360 Cr contract to Toyo Engineering for Ammonium Nitrate II plant.
The plant with 480 MTPD capacity to complete in 20 months, boosting Make in India.
news.summary:
GNFC awarded Rs. 360 Cr contract to Toyo Engineering for Ammonium Nitrate II plant.
The plant with 480 MTPD capacity to complete in 20 months, boosting Make in India.

news.title:
A1 Limited surged 3063% in 5 years, gaining 387% YTD in 2025. It closed at ₹1864.05, up 5% on Friday.
A1 signed a tripartite deal to supply 10,000 MT nitric acid between GNFC and Solar Industries, boosting its market role.
news.summary:
A1 Limited surged 3063% in 5 years, gaining 387% YTD in 2025. It closed at ₹1864.05, up 5% on Friday.
A1 signed a tripartite deal to supply 10,000 MT nitric acid between GNFC and Solar Industries, boosting its market role.

news.title:
GNFC approves Ammonium Nitrate Melt II project with 163,000 MT capacity.
Total CAPEX pipeline at INR 2,800 crore; telecom dispute demand at INR 20,000 crore.
news.summary:
GNFC approves Ammonium Nitrate Melt II project with 163,000 MT capacity.
Total CAPEX pipeline at INR 2,800 crore; telecom dispute demand at INR 20,000 crore.

news.title:
GNFC reports 70% YoY PBT growth in Q2 FY26, showcasing strong performance.
The company highlights strategic CAPEX plans, indicating future growth initiatives.
news.summary:
GNFC reports 70% YoY PBT growth in Q2 FY26, showcasing strong performance.

news.title:
DGTR proposes extending anti-dumping duty on TDI imports from EU, Saudi Arabia for 5 years.
GNFC likely benefits as TDI duty extension shields domestic market from cheaper imports.
news.summary:
DGTR proposes extending anti-dumping duty on TDI imports from EU, Saudi Arabia for 5 years.
GNFC likely benefits as TDI duty extension shields domestic market from cheaper imports.
